business_ideas.idea: Fir Crown: magazine rollup at expensive hobby niches, monetize via commerce products and services
Flying community with airport and real estate - residential airpark development
New York Times games subscription - bundle crossword, cooking, games into one subscription
YouTube Instant Games - play casual games in YouTube without download required
LinkedIn Games platform - multiplayer games leveraging LinkedIn's social graph
Third-party LinkedIn games ecosystem - build games on LinkedIn API for acquisition
AI-powered sports camera system - single camera tracks all action, streams and cuts highlights
MoneyWise podcast - high-net-worth personal finance show revealing detailed financials

predictions.text: AI sports cameras will become standard on every field, like computers on desks - inevitable adoption
Multiple AI camera companies raising 100M+ are winning; youth sports recording becomes standard service
LinkedIn will likely acquire successful third-party games companies built on their platform
